purpose: Dedicated Epstein Evidence Watch for Matrix Reprogrammed: official-source-first document tracking, dated bulletins, PDF/source routing, evidence boundaries, Rumble/video routes, opt-ins, offers, and books.
boundary: This system tracks public records, source pages, court/declassification routes, news bulletins, and archive links. A named person appearing in a public record, flight log, contact book, civil filing, news article, or document set is not by itself proof of criminal conduct.
rules: Official sources, court records, and primary documents outrank commentary.
Every bulletin must be dated and linked to a source route.
Every named association must preserve the association boundary.
The page should sell books and routes without inflating evidence strength.
PDF/source links should be treated as evidence doors, not as automatic claims.
If a live source cannot be checked during build, the site should still build and show the last configured route.

watchSources.title: Court Records And Civil Filings
watchSources.use: Track court filings, rulings, depositions, docket movement, and source documents.

watchSources.title: DOJ / FBI Public Record Lane
watchSources.use: Track official public statements, search pages, releases, and document references.

watchSources.title: Congressional Oversight Lane
watchSources.use: Track committee statements, letters, source releases, and public oversight movement.

watchSources.title: Archive And Research Lane
watchSources.use: Track public archive mirrors, document sets, PDF collections, and preserved files.

watchSources.title: News Bulletin Lane
watchSources.use: Track current reporting, new releases, corrections, and dated news items.

watchSources.title: Rumble / Video Route Lane
watchSources.use: Route document bulletins into explainers, shorts, long-form videos, and Rumble channel pathways.

bulletins.title: How To Read Epstein Files Without Losing The Evidence Boundary
bulletins.label: Evidence boundary
bulletins.summary: The Epstein archive must separate court records, official documents, allegations, associations, media claims, and commentary. The source route matters as much as the name.

bulletins.title: The Epstein Document Map: Court Records, Archives, News, And Video Routes
bulletins.label: Document map
bulletins.summary: A useful Epstein section needs document lanes: court records, official source pages, public archive mirrors, dated news bulletins, downloads, and video explainers.

bulletins.title: Build The Information Machine: Source Watch To Book Sale
bulletins.label: Revenue route
bulletins.summary: The working route is simple: source update, evidence boundary, bulletin, video, opt-in, offer, book page, Amazon store.
